summary: See clues file for full details. 7 tossups, 3 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 7 tossups and 3 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: This artist depicted the victim of a lynching in a lithograph created with his frequent collaborator Bolton Brown.
examples: This artist depicted the victim of a lynching in a lithograph created with his frequent collaborator Bolton Brown.

clues.clue: This artist asked if Da Vinci "had a ticket to paint the Last Supper" while responding to criticism over a work showing German soldiers hiding behind civilians.
examples: This artist asked if Da Vinci "had a ticket to paint the Last Supper" while responding to criticism over a work showing German soldiers hiding behind civilians.

clues.clue: Seascapes by this artist inspired by Winslow Homer depict his frequent visits to Monhegan and Matinicus Islands.
examples: Seascapes by this artist inspired by Winslow Homer depict his frequent visits to Monhegan and Matinicus Islands.

clues.clue: This artist of The Barricade often depicted "splinter beaches" as editor of The Masses, where skinny dippers play in his work (*) 42 Kids.
examples: This artist of The Barricade often depicted "splinter beaches" as editor of The Masses, where skinny dippers play in his work (*) 42 Kids.

clues.clue: This student of Robert Henri  depicted a vendor hawking goods in a crowded scene set underneath clotheslines hanging between tenement buildings.
examples: This student of Robert Henri  depicted a vendor hawking goods in a crowded scene set underneath clotheslines hanging between tenement buildings.

clues.clue: In another painting by this artist, two bloodied men grapple each other at a namesake boxing club.
examples: In another painting by this artist, two bloodied men grapple each other at a namesake boxing club.

clues.clue: A painting by this artist shows an isolated six-story building framed by a bridge and a group of men warming themselves by a fire in the left foreground.
examples: A painting by this artist shows an isolated six-story building framed by a bridge and a group of men warming themselves by a fire in the left foreground.

clues.clue: The foreground of another painting by this artist depicts a worker sitting on a fence, whose blue coat echoes the hazy color of a facade above a pit in the background.
examples: The foreground of another painting by this artist depicts a worker sitting on a fence, whose blue coat echoes the hazy color of a facade above a pit in the background.

clues.clue: A lithograph by this artist shows Billy Sunday lunging forward and pointing into a crowd.
examples: A lithograph by this artist shows Billy Sunday lunging forward and pointing into a crowd.

clues.clue: An illustration by this artist was ironically retitled "Why Don't They Go to the Country for Vacation" when published in the socialist magazine The Masses.
examples: An illustration by this artist was ironically retitled "Why Don't They Go to the Country for Vacation" when published in the socialist magazine The Masses.

clues.clue: This artist painted The Last Tenement and a series showing the construction of Pennsylvania Station.
examples: This artist painted The Last Tenement and a series showing the construction of Pennsylvania Station.

clues.clue: This student of Robert Henri  painted a crowded street scene in which a streetcar passes under clotheslines.
examples: This student of Robert Henri  painted a crowded street scene in which a streetcar passes under clotheslines.
